summary: Completed backend testing for Phase 2 refactored routes. All 16 tests passed. Routes extracted from server.py (notifications, trends, templates) are working correctly with proper authentication. Phase 1 routes (dashboard, settings, pagespeed) also verified to still work.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - returns token with valid credentials
GET /api/notifications - returns notifications list with unread_count
PUT /api/notifications/read-all - marks all notifications as read
GET /api/trends/trending - returns trending searches with count
GET /api/templates - returns templates list (with default templates)
GET /api/dashboard/stats - still works after Phase 2 refactoring
GET /api/dashboard/all - still works after Phase 2 refactoring
GET /api/settings - still works after Phase 2 refactoring
GET /api/pagespeed/all-sites - still works after Phase 2 refactoring
critical_code_review_comments: Phase 2 routes correctly extracted to /app/backend/routes/ directory
notifications.py - CRUD operations for user notifications with proper user_id filtering
trends.py - Google Trends integration with error handling for API failures
templates.py - Article templates CRUD with default templates auto-creation
All routers correctly included in server.py via api_router.include_router()
Database connection properly shared via database.py module
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring Phase 2 verified. Routes extracted from server.py to /app/backend/routes/ directory: notifications.py, trends.py, templates.py. All endpoints working correctly with authentication. Phase 1 routes (pagespeed.py, dashboard.py, settings.py) also verified to still work. The routes/__init__.py exports all routers which are included in server.py via api_router.include_router().
